```{r}
#| include: false
library(fs)
library(yaml)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

root <- "."

summaries <- dir_ls(root, recurse = TRUE, regexp = "_summary\\.qmd$")

parse_summary <- function(path) {
  rel <- path_rel(path, root)
  parts <- str_split(rel, "/")[[1]]
  depth <- length(parts) - 1
  
  # parent folder (H2)
  parent <- if (depth >= 1) parts[1] else ""
  
  # child folder (H3)
  child <- if (depth >= 2) parts[2] else ""
  
  # read YAML + body
  lines <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE)
  end <- which(lines[-1] == "---")[1] + 1
  
  meta <- yaml::yaml.load(paste(lines[2:(end-1)], collapse = "\n"))
  body <- if (length(lines) > end) paste(lines[(end+1):length(lines)], collapse = "\n") else ""
  
  tibble(
    path = path,
    rel = rel,
    depth = depth,
    parent = parent,
    child = child,
    order = meta$order %||% Inf,
    title = meta$title %||% str_to_title(gsub("-", " ", child)),
    subtitle = meta$subtitle %||% "",
    icon = meta$icon %||% "",
    body = body
  )
}

df <- map_dfr(summaries, parse_summary)

# Hierarchical sort:
# 1. parent folder
# 2. H2 order
# 3. child folder
# 4. H3 order
df <- df %>%
  arrange(parent, depth, order, child)

generate_section <- function(path, rel, depth, parent, child, order, title, subtitle, icon, body) {
  level <- str_dup("#", depth + 1)
  icon_html <- if (icon != "") {
    paste0('<div class="icon icon-', icon, '"></div>\n\n')
  } else ""
  paste0(
    level, " ", title, "\n\n",
    if (subtitle != "") paste0("**", subtitle, "**\n\n") else "",
    icon_html,
    body, "\n"
  )
}

output <- df %>% pmap_chr(generate_section) %>% paste(collapse = "\n")

cat(output)
```
